en: The LORD reigns, let the earth rejoice; let the many coastlands be glad!
zh: 耶和華作王，願地快樂， 願眾海島都歡喜。

en: Clouds and thick darkness are all around him; righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.
zh: 密雲和幽暗在他的四圍， 公義和公正是他寶座的根基。

en: Fire goes before him and burns up his adversaries all around.
zh: 有火走在他的前面， 燒盡他四圍的敵人。

en: His lightnings light up the world; the earth sees and trembles.
zh: 他的閃電照亮世界， 大地看見了就戰慄。

en: The mountains melt like wax before the LORD, before the Lord of all the earth.
zh: 在耶和華面前，就是在全地的主面前， 群山都像蠟一般融化。

en: The heavens proclaim his righteousness, and all the peoples see his glory.
zh: 諸天傳揚他的公義， 萬民得見他的榮耀。

en: All worshipers of images are put to shame, who make their boast in worthless idols; worship him, all you gods!
zh: 願所有事奉雕刻的偶像的， 以虛無的偶像為誇口的，都蒙羞； 眾神哪！你們都要拜他。

en: Zion hears and is glad, and the daughters of Judah rejoice, because of your judgments, O LORD.
zh: 耶和華啊！錫安聽見你的判斷就歡喜， 猶大的各城 也都快樂。

en: For you, O LORD, are most high over all the earth; you are exalted far above all gods.
zh: 耶和華啊！因為你是全地的至高者； 你被尊崇，遠超過眾神之上。

en: O you who love the LORD, hate evil! He preserves the lives of his saints; he delivers them from the hand of the wicked.
zh: 你們愛耶和華的，都要恨惡罪惡； 耶和華保護聖民的性命， 救他們脫離惡人的手。

en: Light is sown for the righteous, and joy for the upright in heart.
zh: 有亮光照耀 義人， 心裡正直的人得享喜樂。

en: Rejoice in the LORD, O you righteous, and give thanks to his holy name!
zh: 義人哪！你們要靠耶和華歡喜， 要稱讚他的聖名。
